subject: fix(quality): resolve audit findings from DaisyUI migration review
body:
7 issues found and fixed:

1. CLAUDE.md Architecture: Remove 5 deleted files (useAppTheme.ts,
   Colors.ts, Themed.tsx, useColorScheme x2), add 4 new files
   (global.css, metro.config.js, themeColors.ts, useTheme.ts)

2. CLAUDE.md Project Status: Update 3 stale references — useAppTheme
   to useTheme, old theme description to DaisyUI combos, BurgerMenu
   description to include combo picker

3. TutorialModal step 6: Update user-facing text to mention theme
   combo picker (Teal, Nature, Nordic, Bold) alongside dark/light toggle

4-5. Remove unused useTheme imports from +not-found.tsx and StationCard.tsx
     (both use only className, no hex colors needed)

6. Fix pre-existing TS error: Export VALID_AMENITIES and VALID_PROVINCES
   from stationValidation.ts, import in bulk-import.tsx (was referencing
   unexported constants)

7. Empty constants/ directory confirmed — git handles automatically

Tags: quality, cleanup, documentation, audit
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-theme-migration
